text: What if your brain has a secret way to detox? Enter the glymphatic system, your brain's cleaning crew that works while you sleep. This network of vessels removes waste like amyloid-beta, linked to Alzheimer’s. Recent studies show sleep quality directly impacts this system's efficiency. So, better sleep means a healthier brain. Are you getting enough rest? Dive deeper into brain health—like and follow for more science insights!
